title: Villages Revamped
description: A datapack that reworks vanilla minecraft villages.
body:
Hello!

If you would like to show some support you can subscribe to my [Patreon](https://patreon.com/brutusmaxi?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) and get access to my schematics and some of my custom made maps. Thank you for the appreciation.

Villages Revamped was inspired by the datapack Towns & Towers. I have created custom cherry, plains, taiga, desert, savanna and snowy villages. My end goal is to revamp all minecraft structures and add a ton of custom ones as well, a "minecraft structure update" if you will. This datapack includes just the vanilla villages and a cherry grove village for now.If you want a datapack with more custom structures you should check out my Vanilla Structure Update datapack. It has these villages plus more!

This datapack basically just replaces vanilla villages so you are still able to use sites such as https://www.chunkbase.com/ to locate villages across your world. This datapack doesn't add any new villager professions or trades.
